[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000110 2
1 0010001101 4
2 1110001111 7
3 0100010111 5
4 1110000100 4
5 0011110001 5
6 1011111011 8
7 1001011110 6

01 10 0000000010 1
12 21 0000000100 1
23 32 0010001101 4 match 1
34 43 0100000111 4
45 54 0100000100 2
56 65 0010000000 1
67 76 0010110001 4
70 07 0000010000 1

02 20 0000001000 1
13 31 0000000110 2 match 0
24 42 0000000101 2
35 53 1110000100 4 match 4
46 64 0000010001 2
57 75 0010000000 1
60 06 0001010000 2
71 17 0000000000 a

25 52 0010000100 2
36 63 0010000001 2
47 74 0000010001 2
50 05 1000000000 1
61 16 0000000000 a
72 27 0010000001 2
